title: Luffy’s Grief and the ASL Past: Turning Point
description: In the Post-War / ASL Flashback storyline, this section centers on Unknown person #5, Sabo, Whitebeard, Unknown person #9, Unknown person #23, Unknown person #24 as the scene develops across pages 15–18.
scene: This scene advances the Post-War / ASL Flashback conflict through Unknown person #5, Sabo, Whitebeard, Unknown person #9, Unknown person #23, focusing on the immediate stakes of luffy’s grief and the asl past: turning point.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: Open the damn gates, you military assholes!!!

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: All right!! I've cut the rope!!

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: Okay....!! It's not hot at all!!

dialogue.speaker: Sabo
dialogue.text: ...to change the ways of this land....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Sabo
dialogue.text: Old Guy... You really believe me...?

dialogue.speaker: Sabo
dialogue.text: Yes... I will not forget your words.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Dragon....!! ve have completed the preparations ....!!!

summary: This scene advances the Post-War / ASL Flashback conflict through Unknown person #5, Sabo, Whitebeard, Unknown person #9, Unknown person #23, focusing on the immediate stakes of luffy’s grief and the asl past: turning point.
